name: Shinobird Crane
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>霊魂鳥</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>エスプリット・バード</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－<ruby lang="jp"><rb>巫</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>かんなぎ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>鶴</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>づる</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Cannot be Special Summoned. Once per turn, if another Spirit monster is Normal or Special Summoned while this monster is on the field: You can draw 1 card. Once per turn, during the End Phase, if this card was Normal Summoned or flipped face-up this turn: Return it to the hand.
mnst_eff: Cannot be Special Summoned. Once per turn, if another Spirit monster is Normal or Special Summoned while this monster is on the field: You can draw 1 card. Once per turn, during the End Phase, if this card was Normal Summoned or flipped face-up this turn: Return it to the hand.
eff: Cannot be Special Summoned. Once per turn, if another Spirit monster is Normal or Special Summoned while this monster is on the field: You can draw 1 card. Once per turn, during the End Phase, if this card was Normal Summoned or flipped face-up this turn: Return it to the hand.

action: Activates during the turn in which it was Normal Summoned
Returns from your field to your hand
